sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 존슨앤드존슨은 2025년 4분기 매출 246억 달러를 기록하며 연간 매출 942억 달러를 달성했고, 2026년 매출 가이던스로 1,005억 달러를 제시했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 4분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 9.1% 증가한 246억 달러를 기록했으며, 연간 매출은 6.0% 성장한 942억 달러를 달성했습니다.
2026년 연간 실적 가이던스로 매출 1,005억 달러, 조정 EPS 11.53달러를 제시하며 성장세를 이어갈 것으로 전망했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 종양학, 면역학, 신경과학 등 6개 핵심 사업 분야에서 혁신적인 과학 기술을 바탕으로 시장 리더십을 확대하고 있습니다.
Halda Therapeutics 인수와 OTTAVA 로봇 수술 시스템 제출 등 파이프라인 강화 및 신규 기술 확보를 위한 전략적 행보를 보였습니다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 가이던스 달성을 위해 제시된 6개 핵심 사업부의 성장세가 실제 분기별 실적에서 어떻게 구체화되는지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2025q4exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Media contact: media-relations@its.jnj.com Investor contact: investor-relations@its.jnj.com For immediate release Johnson & Johnson reports Q4 and Full-Year 2025 results • 2025 Fourth-Quarter reported sales growth of 9.1% to $24.6 Billion with operational growth of 7.1%* and adjusted operational growth of 6.1%*; 2025 Fourth-Quarter earnings per share (EPS) of $2.10 and adjusted EPS of $2.46, both include $(0.10) due to the acquisition of Halda Therapeutics • 2025 Full-Year reported sales growth of 6.0% to $94.2 Billion with operational growth of 5.3%* and adjusted operational growth of 4.2%*; 2025 Full-Year earnings per share (EPS) of $11.03 and adjusted EPS of $10.79, both include $(0.10) due to the acquisition of Halda Therapeutics • Significant i  Normalized numeric aliases: $24.6 Billion = 246억 달러; $94.2 Billion = 942억 달러; $24.6 = 24.6달러; $2.10 = 2.10달러; $2.46 = 2.46달러; $94.2 = 94.2달러; $11.03 = 11.03달러; $10.79 = 10.79달러.

EVANT FASPRO plus LAZCLUZE for non-small cell lung cancer, landmark data for TECVAYLI plus DARZALEX FASPRO as a potential standard of care as early as second line for patients with relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, the acquisition of Halda Therapeutics, and submission of OTTAVA Robotic Surgical System • Company issues guidance for 2026 with estimated reported sales of $100.5 Billion or 6.7% at the midpoint, and adjusted EPS 4 of $11.53 or 6.9% at the midpoint New Brunswick, N.J. (January 21, 2026) – Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) today announced results for fourth-quarter and full-year 2025. "2025 was a catapult year for Johnson & Johnson, fueled by the strongest portfolio and pipeline in our history” said Joaquin Duato, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Johnson & Johnson. “Last year kicked off a new era of accelerated growth, driven by medical innovation that is transforming live  Normalized numeric aliases: $100.5 Billion = 1,005억 달러; $100.5 = 100.5달러; $11.53 = 11.53달러.

s in our six key businesses: Oncology, Immunology, Neuroscience, Cardiovascular, Surgery, and Vision. In each of these important areas, our leadership is expanding driven by game-changing science and technology.” Overall financial results Q4 Full Year ($ in Millions, except EPS) 2025 2024 % Change 2025 2024 % Change Reported Sales $24,564 $22,520 9.1% $94,193 $88,821 6.0% Net Earnings $5,116 $3,431 49.1% $26,804 $14,066 90.6% EPS (diluted) $2.10 $1.41 48.9% $11.03 $5.79 90.5% Q4 Full Year Non-GAAP* ($ in Millions, except EPS) 2025 2024 % Change 2025 2024 % Cha  Normalized numeric aliases: $5,116 = 5,116달러; $3,431 = 3,431달러; $2.10 = 2.10달러; $1.41 = 1.41달러; $11.03 = 11.03달러; $5.79 = 5.79달러; $6,009 = 6,009달러; $4,946 = 4,946달러; $2.04 = 2.04달러; 94,193 million = 941억 9,300만 달러; 14,066 million = 140억 6,600만 달러; 19,700 million = 197억 달러; 6,009 million = 60억 900만 달러; 4,946 million = 49억 4,600만 달러; 26,215 million = 262억 1,500만 달러; 24,242 million = 242억 4,200만 달러; 19,842 million = 198억 4,200만 달러.
